name: Executive Dashboard - HappyCMDB v3.0
description: High-level IT spend, service health, and risk metrics for executive leadership

cards.name: Total IT Spend (Annual)
cards.description: Total annual IT spend across all active configuration items

native.query: SELECT SUM(COALESCE((tbm_attributes->>'monthly_cost')::DECIMAL, 0) * 12) AS annual_spend FROM cmdb.dim_ci WHERE is_current = TRUE AND ci_status = 'active'

cards.name: IT Spend by Business Capability
cards.description: Annual IT spend broken down by business capability

native.query: SELECT business_capability, annual_cost FROM v_executive_cost_summary ORDER BY annual_cost DESC LIMIT 10

cards.name: Cost Trends (12 Months)
cards.description: Monthly cost trends over the past 12 months by TBM tower

native.query: SELECT month, tbm_resource_tower, monthly_cost FROM v_cost_trends WHERE month >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 months' ORDER BY month

cards.name: Service Health by Criticality Tier
cards.description: Average service health score by business criticality tier

native.query: SELECT business_criticality, ROUND(AVG(health_score), 2) AS avg_health_score FROM v_service_health_scorecard GROUP BY business_criticality ORDER BY business_criticality

cards.name: Revenue at Risk
cards.description: Top 5 services with revenue at risk from open incidents

native.query: SELECT business_service, business_criticality, open_incidents, total_revenue_at_risk, pct_revenue_at_risk FROM v_revenue_at_risk ORDER BY total_revenue_at_risk DESC LIMIT 5

cards.name: Top Cost Drivers
cards.description: Top 10 configuration items by monthly cost

cards.name: Compliance Status
cards.description: Compliance status summary by regulatory framework

native.query: SELECT compliance_framework, compliance_rate FROM v_compliance_summary ORDER BY compliance_rate ASC

cards.name: Open Incidents by Priority
cards.description: Current open incidents grouped by priority

native.query: SELECT priority, incident_count FROM v_incident_summary WHERE status IN ('new', 'assigned', 'in_progress', 'pending') ORDER BY priority
